column1: Enable order antifraud checks for this scope.

column1: Maximum number of orders per email per store day. Leave empty or set 0 to disable.
column2: Maximum number of orders per email per store day. Leave empty or set 0 to disable.

column1: Maximum total order amount per email per store day. The value is compared with order base totals, so configure it in the website base currency. Leave empty or set 0 to disable.
column2: Maximum total order amount per email per store day. The value is compared with order base totals, so configure it in the website base currency. Leave empty or set 0 to disable.

column1: Emails that bypass daily order count and amount limits. Blacklists still block these emails. Separate by new line, comma, semicolon or spaces.
column2: Emails that bypass daily order count and amount limits. Blacklists still block these emails. Separate by new line, comma, semicolon or spaces.

column1: Orders from these emails are blocked. Separate by new line, comma, semicolon or spaces.
column2: Orders from these emails are blocked. Separate by new line, comma, semicolon or spaces.

column1: Registered customers with these IDs are blocked. Guest orders are checked by e-mail and IP only. Separate by new line, comma, semicolon or spaces.
column2: Registered customers with these IDs are blocked. Guest orders are checked by e-mail and IP only. Separate by new line, comma, semicolon or spaces.

column1: Orders from these IP addresses are blocked. IPv4, IPv6 and CIDR ranges are supported.
column2: Orders from these IP addresses are blocked. IPv4, IPv6 and CIDR ranges are supported.
